videoSnippet.title: "The Boy Who Would be King" || Topalov vs Kasparov || Moscow Olympiad (1994)
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Lotus Chess April Arena https://lichess.org/tournament/nT0JRnZV
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/
https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments

Veselin Topalov vs Garry Kasparov
"The Boy Who Would be King" (game of the day May-05-2006)
Moscow Olympiad (1994), Moscow RUS, rd 6, Dec-06
Sicilian Defense: Scheveningen Variation. Delayed Keres Attack (B81)  ·

1. e4 c5 2. Nf3 d6 3. d4 cd4 4. Nd4 Nf6 5. Nc3 a6 6. Be3 e6 7. g4 h6 8. f4 Nc6 9. Be2 e5 10. Nf5 g6 11. Ng3 ef4 12. Bf4 Be6 13. Rf1 Rc8 14. h3 Qb6 15. Qd2 Bg7 16. Bd6 Ng4 17. Bg4 Qb2 18. e5 Ne5 19. Rb1 Qc3 20. Qc3 Rc3 21. Be6 fe6 22. Rb7 Nc4 23. Bb4 Re3 24. Ne2 Be5 25. Rff7 Rh3 26. Nd4 Re3 27. Kf1 Re4 28. Rfe7

0:01 Hello Everyone!
